headline: One of These Oil Services Stocks Is Pulling Away From the Pack: Baker Hughes, Haliburton, SLB
summary: Benchmark West Texas Intermediate crude oil surged from $55.44 a barrel in mid-December 2025 to $94.65 as of March 9, and the oil services sector is moving with it. On Tuesday, Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR), Halliburton (NYSE: HAL), and SLB (NYSE: SLB) (formerly Schlumberger) all traded sharply higher, with the VanEck Oil Services ETF (NYSEARCA: ... headline: Baker Hughes, Petrobras Sign Strategic Service Agreement for Critical Turbomachinery Equipment
summary: Long-term agreement covers maintenance, repairs and advisory services for up to 64 aeroderivative gas turbines critical to Brazil’s offshore and refinery operationsWork to be delivered from the Baker Hughes Service Center in Petrópolis, Rio de Janeiro, with plans for further expansion of capacity and capability, strengthening Brazil’s energy supply chain HOUSTON and LONDON, March 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR), an energy technology company, announced Wednesday a substant
